value_metric: a minimal, dependency-free Official Connector Interface (discover/fetch/verify/normalize/attachments/cursor/health) + typed contract + adapter registry that every A0 government adapter (T034+) plugs into -- the plumbing for replacing Board-3 news noise with A0 official original text, with real HTTP fetch wired into the kernel from the start

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: SDK only; not wired to worker/D1; the live gov.cn smoke ran from the dev environment (not the worker), so 0 cloud cost. Once A0 adapters are wired to the worker cron (T034+), each fetch is a Worker subrequest and must be counted against the DIR-007 free tier.

gov.cn.title: 中国政府网_中央人民政府门户网站
